name.en: Thought Occurrence Questionnaire – Task-Relevant Worries Dimension
name.tr: Düşünce Belirme Anketi – Görevle İlgili Kaygılar Boyutu

construct.tr: Odaklanma sırasında ortaya çıkan görevle ilgili kaygılar

original_citation.en: Sarason, I. G., Sarason, B. R., Keefe, D. E., Hayes, B. E., & Shearin, E. N. (1986). Cognitive interference: Situational determinants and traitlike characteristics. Journal of Personality and Social Psychology, 51(1), 215–226. https://doi.org/10.1037/0022-3514.51.1.215
original_citation.tr: Sarason, I. G., Sarason, B. R., Keefe, D. E., Hayes, B. E., & Shearin, E. N. (1986). Cognitive interference: Situational determinants and traitlike characteristics. Journal of Personality and Social Psychology, 51(1), 215–226. https://doi.org/10.1037/0022-3514.51.1.215

description.en: Worries and intrusive thoughts experienced while trying to concentrate on a task.
description.tr: Bir göreve odaklanmaya çalışırken yaşanan kaygılar ve intrüzif düşünceler.

response_format_tr: 5-point Likert scale, from 1 = never to 5 = very often
response_format_en: 5’li Likert tipi ölçek, 1 = Hiçbir zaman ile 5 = Çok sık
target_population_tr: Odaklanma ya da görev temelli bağlamlardaki yetişkinler.
target_population_en: Adults in concentration- or task-focused settings.

reliability.en: Omega was .84 in the current study.

validity_notes.en: CFA results indicated that the scale fit the data well.
validity_notes.tr: CFA sonuçları, ölçeğin veriye iyi uyum gösterdiğini ortaya koymuştur.

citation.en: Peker, M., & Bağlıcakoğlu, G. (2025). Task-related fluctuations in action-state orientation: Roles of anticipated task difficulty and task-related affect. Motivation and Emotion, 49(2), 103-119. https://doi.org/10.1007/s11031-024-10108-8
citation.tr: Peker, M., & Bağlıcakoğlu, G. (2025). Task-related fluctuations in action-state orientation: Roles of anticipated task difficulty and task-related affect. Motivation and Emotion, 49(2), 103-119. https://doi.org/10.1007/s11031-024-10108-8

notes.en: This form includes only the task-relevant worries dimension of the Thought Occurrence Questionnaire.
notes.tr: Bu form, Thought Occurrence Questionnaire’ın yalnızca görevle ilgili kaygılar boyutunu içerir.
